title: RE:ZERO Return by Death Sound
description: Adds the Return by Death sound from RE:Zero as the player death sound.
body:
# This pack adds Subaru’s Return by Death sound effect from Re:Zero.

## Every time you die, it’s like you’ll relive the same cursed loop because, apparently, that’s what you wanted.

### Install at your own risk. Emotional damage not included.
_*Turn "Instant Respawn" ON for a better experience._
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B6oFFwAAmPc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
